name: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Large DNS Packets
notes: This Building Block identifies flows with abnormaly large DNS packets
bb_references: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Large DNS Packets on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the destination byte/packet ratio is greater than 1000 bytes/packet
when the destination port is one of the following 53
when the flow context is Local to Remote, Remote to Local
when the destination bytes is greater than 1
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Large DNS Packets on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the destination byte/packet ratio is greater than 1000 bytes/packet
AND when the destination port is one of the following 53
AND when the flow context is Local to Remote, Remote to Local
AND when the destination bytes is greater than 1
